faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Woodhaven homes?
faqs.answer: Woodhaven properties typically encounter cellar spiders, common house spiders, wolf spiders, and occasional sac spiders. The area's older homes and proximity to Forest Park can also attract jumping spiders and orb weavers, especially during warmer months. Our treatments target all common species found in Queens.
